definition: The ongoing turning over or examining of a theme in the mind after it has been taken up.
notes: Project preference is pondering because it pairs naturally with thinking and conveys continued mental engagement without sounding overly technical.

context_rules.context: In project translations of jhāna formulae
In explanatory prose emphasizing reflective examination
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when it reads better.

example_phrases.notes: Common in descriptions of the first jhāna.
